logicItems.name: Chassis Information
logicItems.action: Ask Input Group: Application and Chassis

logicItems.name: Body width is over 102 inches rule
logicItems.action: Warning Message: You specified a body width in excess of 102" (the Federal interstate limit).  You may proceed but the customer must check local regulations and obtain special permits.

logicItems.name: Suggest FRP
logicItems.action: Warning Message: We recommend fiber reinforced plywood interior.  FRP eliminates the need for vertical support posts, and makes it easy to customize and maximize interior space. To go back and change your selection, click Cancel. To continue click Ok.

logicItems.name: Liftgate System Info
logicItems.action: Ask Input Group: Liftgate System Info

logicItems.action: Ask Input Group: Hood and Front

logicItems.action: Run Logic Group: Real Time 2D Door

logicItems.action: Ask Input Group: Side Roll-up Doors

logicItems.name: Show the Track Locations Input Group
2 Rows
logicItems.action: Error Message: Track 1 and 2 are located at the same position.  Please specify a different location for at least one of the tracks.

logicItems.name: 3 Rows
logicItems.action: Error Message: Track 3 is located at the same position as track 1 or 2.  Please specify a different location for at least one of the tracks.

logicItems.name: 4 Rows
logicItems.action: Error Message: Track 4 is located at the same position as track 1, 2, or 3.  Please specify a different location for at least one of the tracks.
